mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, caption, has_location, latitude, longitude, taken_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{caption}, #{hasLocation}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{takenAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO post_images (post_id, sort_order, storage_type, path, content_type, size_bytes, exif_available, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{sortOrder}, #{storageType}, #{path}, #{contentType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{exifAvailable}, #{createdAt})
